findings: Launcher establishes repo-local artifact root at $REPO_PATH/.stampede/{run_id} and creates logs/scripts/pids + commanders/ and collab/ for metaswarm.
Worker prompts align with .stampede/{run_id}/{queue,claimed,results,logs} paths documented in README for baseline stampede.

Metaswarm progress_dir includes commanders/{commander_id}/{atoms,logs}; commander prompt requires bundle.json and copying bundle to BASE_DIR/results — README mentions swarm-state.json/child-agents.jsonl but omits bundle/atoms/logs/results-copy behavior.
Metaswarm collab/ bus is created and exported by launcher but not described in README.
Teardown checks legacy run dirs (~/.copilot/stampede and ~/.stampede) in addition to repo .stampede, but README only documents repo-local .stampede.
